name: Summarization Prompt
template: Summarize the following article in five bullet points.

name: Classification Prompt
template: Classify this review as Positive, Negative, or Neutral.

name: Information Extraction Prompt
template: Extract the following information from the text: Person, Organization, Date, Location.

name: Translation Prompt
template: Translate the following English paragraph into Filipino.

name: Reasoning Prompt
template: Solve the problem step-by-step and explain your reasoning.
